content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_kslacdqOPB1qzwi7fo1_400.jpg)

I think It is wrong for me to be able to chat with myself. -"-

I still like [WhatsApp](http://itunes.apple.com/WebObjects/MZStore.woa/wa/viewSoftware?id=310633997&mt=8) though. And I will like it even more if it works with Blackberry people, with the BBM not as the BBM. Hehe ... Too much to ask for, I guess.
